name: io.github.Ayo-Fam/mcp-cloudflare-dns
title: MCP Cloudflare DNS
description: Cloudflare DNS MCP server: manage zones, records, cache purge, and page rules.

environmentVariables.name: CF_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Cloudflare API token with Zone DNS Edit, Zone Read, and Cache Purge permissions

environmentVariables.name: CF_ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable DNS record deletion and full cache purge
